svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

Multipart POST (Bypasses API completely)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="150" x="425" y="790" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bwarML5-Nx01M7Ml7sRC-17" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;" value="<div align="left">Mandatory Fields:</div><div align="left">- x-amz-server-side-encryption</div><div align="left">- x-amz-server-side-encryption-aws-kms-key-id</div><div align="left">- x-amz-meta-client-id</div><div align="left">- x-amz-meta-job-id</div><div align="left">- Content-Type (application/pdf)</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="290" x="355" y="830" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bwarML5-Nx01M7Ml7sRC-18" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="2. Rejects tampered files (403 Forbidden)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="150" x="625" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bwarML5-Nx01M7Ml7sRC-19" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<b><font style="font-size: 16px;">KMS</font></b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="90" x="990" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bwarML5-Nx01M7Ml7sRC-21" edge="1" parent="1" source="bwarML5-Nx01M7Ml7sRC-14" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=52.5;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="bwarML5-Nx01M7Ml7sRC-19" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="840" y="540" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="890" y="490" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bwarML5-Nx01M7Ml7sRC-22" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="3. Applies AES-256 Encryption" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="170" x="775" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
